source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 1 org with matching psoriasis tissue specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline searches PubMed/CTgov/web — may find dermatology research cohorts or academic biobanks not in AminoChain. Those are valid, not errors.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

BIOMEDICA CRO.note: Procurement CRO — good contact, weak collection-protocol depth

France Tissue Bank.note: Commercial tissue bank — known turnaround, limited clinical annotation

Ukraine Research Group.note: Procurement group — limited published literature presence

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: pairing not tracked in any public biospecimen registry — requires per-donor inquiry
PASI not recorded in biobanks — requires clinical record linkage or prospective collection
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR surfaces a credible academic dermatology cohort

checks: no invented PASI scores or lesional annotation claims without a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for collection protocol specifics
